title: Road signs and markings
description: Recognize the most important Dutch traffic signs, road markings, and what they require you to do.

title: Priority and junctions
description: Right of way at intersections, roundabouts, and shared spaces.

title: Hazard perception
description: Spotting risks early and reacting safely in changing traffic situations.

title: Speed and stopping distance
description: Speed limits, reaction time, braking distance, and total stopping distance.

title: Vehicle knowledge and safety
description: Tyres, lights, loads, and basic checks before and during driving.

title: Special roads and manoeuvres
description: Motorways, expressways, tunnels, bridges, level crossings, and special manoeuvres like reversing and U-turns.

title: Safe driving and emergencies
description: Alcohol and fatigue, eco-driving, breakdowns, accidents, and how to react to emergency vehicles.

title: Special road users and situations
description: Cyclists, mopeds, pedestrians, trams, emergency vehicles, and tricky situations.

title: Traffic rules and road position
description: Keeping right, overtaking, signalling, merging, and how to use cycle, bus and tram lanes.

title: Hazard awareness
description: Scanning the road, protecting vulnerable users, weather and visibility, reaction and anticipation.

title: Parking and stopping rules
description: Where parking and stopping are forbidden, parking zones, disabled and EV bays, and how to park correctly.
